templates.name: Garage QBCore
templates.description: Garage véhicules avec spawn, rangement et liste owned vehicles
templates.author: mdcodeV

files.client.lua:
local QBCore = exports['qb-core']:GetCoreObject()

local function openGarage(garage)
    QBCore.Functions.TriggerCallback('qb-garage:server:getVehicles', function(vehicles)
        print(('[Garage] %s vehicles'):format(#vehicles))
    end)
end

CreateThread(function()
    for _, garage in ipairs(Config.Garages) do
        -- TODO: ox_target zone ici
        RegisterCommand('garage', function() openGarage(garage) end)
    end
end)
files.server.lua:
local QBCore = exports['qb-core']:GetCoreObject()

QBCore.Functions.CreateCallback('qb-garage:server:getVehicles', function(source, cb)
    local Player = QBCore.Functions.GetPlayer(source)
    if not Player then return cb({}) end
    cb({})
end)

templates.name: Job Ambulance ox_lib
templates.description: Job EMS avec prise de service, revive et facturation basique
templates.author: mdcodeV

files.client.lua:
local onDuty = false

RegisterNetEvent('ox-ambulance:client:setDuty', function(state)
    onDuty = state
    lib.notify({ title = 'EMS', description = state and 'En service' or 'Hors service' })
end)

RegisterCommand('emsduty', function()
    TriggerServerEvent('ox-ambulance:server:toggleDuty')
end)

RegisterCommand('revive', function()
    if not onDuty then return end
    TriggerServerEvent('ox-ambulance:server:reviveNearest')
end)
files.server.lua:
RegisterNetEvent('ox-ambulance:server:toggleDuty', function()
    local src = source
    TriggerClientEvent('ox-ambulance:client:setDuty', src, true)
end)

RegisterNetEvent('ox-ambulance:server:reviveNearest', function()
    local src = source
    print(('[EMS] revive by %s'):format(src))
end)

templates.name: ATM / Banking QBCore
templates.description: ATM interactif avec dépôt et retrait
templates.author: mdcodeV

files.client.lua:
local QBCore = exports['qb-core']:GetCoreObject()

RegisterCommand('atm', function()
    TriggerServerEvent('qb-atm:server:open')
end)
files.server.lua:
local QBCore = exports['qb-core']:GetCoreObject()

RegisterNetEvent('qb-atm:server:open', function()
    local src = source
    local Player = QBCore.Functions.GetPlayer(src)
    if not Player then return end
    TriggerClientEvent('QBCore:Notify', src, 'ATM ouvert', 'success')
end)

files.fxmanifest.lua:
fx_version 'cerulean'
game 'gta5'
lua54 'yes'

name 'status-hud'
version '1.0.0'

ui_page 'html/index.html'
client_scripts { 'client.lua' }

files { 'html/index.html', 'html/style.css', 'html/app.js' }
files.client.lua:
local hunger, thirst = 100, 100

CreateThread(function()
    while true do
        hunger = math.max(0, hunger - 1)
        thirst = math.max(0, thirst - 1.5)
        SendNUIMessage({ action = 'update', hunger = hunger, thirst = thirst })
        Wait(10000)
    end
end)

templates.name: Vehicle Shop Qbox
templates.description: Concessionnaire véhicules avec preview et achat
templates.author: mdcodeV

files.server.lua:
RegisterNetEvent('qbox-vehicleshop:server:buy', function(model, price)
    local src = source
    print(('[VehShop] %s achète %s pour $%s'):format(src, model, price))
end)
